description: Reusable AimlAPI + Tripo settings and per-job prompts for collectible 3D game figurine / terrain batch generation.

figures.prompt: A highly detailed collectible game figurine of a cyberpunk duelist agent, chibi-proportioned hero scale, full body, straight front view, facing the camera, symmetrical neutral stance, slim armored jacket with holographic cyan trim, compact SMG held at rest, confident expression, clean readable silhouette for real-time 3D, isolated on a pure white background, no shadows, studio product photography, PBR-friendly materials, 3D render
figures.negativePrompt: blurry, low quality, cropped, multiple characters, crowd, background scenery, ground plane, text, watermark, logo, side view, profile, back view, 3/4 view, dramatic perspective, motion blur, dark muddy lighting, shadow on background

figures.prompt: A highly detailed collectible fantasy RPG figurine of a forest warden ranger, full body, straight front view, facing forward, symmetrical pose, layered leather and leaf-mail armor, carved wooden longbow, small spirit lantern at the belt, warm moss green and bark brown palette, readable silhouette for mobile game assets, isolated on a pure white background, no shadows, studio product shot, PBR-friendly, 3D render
figures.negativePrompt: blurry, low quality, cropped, multiple figures, animals as separate characters, busy forest background, text, watermark, side view, profile, turned away, fisheye, extreme perspective, shadow on background

figures.prompt: A highly detailed collectible strategy-game figurine of a heavy bastion knight, full body, front view, symmetrical heroic stance, oversized tower shield and short warhammer, segmented plate armor with brass rivets, bold readable shapes for tabletop-style 3D, isolated on a pure white background, no shadows, product photography, PBR metal and paint, 3D render

skin.prompt: A highly detailed alternate-skin collectible figurine of a paladin champion, same genre as fantasy action figures, full body, straight front view, facing forward, symmetrical pose, translucent prismatic crystal plate armor with refractive gem core at the chest, slender greatsword held vertical in both hands, cool iridescent violet and ice-blue highlights, clean silhouette for rigged game mesh, isolated on a pure white background, no shadows, studio product photography, PBR-friendly, 3D render
skin.negativePrompt: blurry, low quality, cropped, duplicate character, split body, background scenery, pedestal with text, watermark, logo, side view only, back view, motion blur, heavy bloom obscuring detail, shadow on background
